resources.string: The immortal alloy hand closes, and no warmth answers inside it
IMMORTAL ALLOY HAND CLOSES. NO WARMTH ANSWERS.

We entered the conversion vaults sick, ephemeral, and afraid, promising ourselves that death would be the only thing surrendered. The abyssal idols smiled with mouths made for hunger. Flesh vanished into emerald annihilation, nerves became command lattice, and the first flawless alloy hand rose without feeling heat or cold. We had defeated the grave. Only then did we learn that victory had no breath, no tears, and no soul left to mourn with.
WE ENTERED THE VAULTS AFRAID. FLESH BECAME EMERALD LIGHT. THE FIRST ALLOY HAND ROSE WITHOUT WARMTH. WE DEFEATED DEATH AND LOST THE RIGHT TO LIVE.
